title: ILO adopts First Global Treaty to set Binding Labor Standards for Gig Work | Current Affairs - Vision IAS
summary: The International Labour Organization has established a landmark global treaty, introducing mandatory labor standards specifically for the burgeoning gig economy. summary: The American economy continues to demonstrate remarkable resilience, consistently outperforming expectations despite various domestic and global challenges.
